hooks.command: jq -r 'if (.tool_response.exit_code // 0) != 0 then {"hookSpecificOutput": {"hookEventName": "PostToolUse", "additionalContext": "HOOK: Playwright tests failed. Do NOT proceed to step 5. Go to step 4b to collect a debug trace, then fix the failing tests and re-run step 4 before committing."}} | tojson else empty end'
